note: Generated Nicks-style 2:1 spatial-forcing diagnostics with kernel-derived Appendix-B coefficient tables and Figure 8-style region comparisons. This is not a source-figure reproduction or calibration claim.
rights_status: generated outputs only; no copied paper figures or full text

solver.method: source-equation two-amplitude 2:1 spatial-resonance diagnostic with Appendix-B kernel-derived coefficients
solver.boundary_model: finite generated cortical frame plus inverse log-polar visual-field frame
solver.transfer_function: reduced amplitude equations with symmetric rho_a=rho_b branch

parameters.source_kernel: balanced isotropic 2D source kernel with A=sigma^-2

examples.label: Nicks rectangle response amplitude diagnostic
examples.domain: generated cortical grid on [0, 31.41592653589793]^2 with inverse log-polar visual-field frame

source_target.target_relationship: forcing_x = 2*response_x with |response| fixed at the Turing wavenumber

source_target.source_target_kind: equation-derived 2:1 wavevector target plus Figure 8-style region target
source_target.source_target_reference: Nicks et al. 2021 equations 4.11-4.18 and Figure 8 parameter grid; no source figure data
source_target.target_relationship: forcing_x = 2*response_x with |response| fixed at the Turing wavenumber

amplitude_coefficients.source_parameter_set: Figure 8-style defaults h=0, sigma=0.5, epsilon^2 delta=0.3
amplitude_coefficients.coefficient_normalization: source balanced-kernel Appendix-B coefficients evaluated from equations B.6-B.9 and B.25-B.26
amplitude_coefficients.kernel_coefficient_status: kernel-derived source coefficients; source-figure digitized region residuals remain deferred

figure8_region.source_target_reference: Nicks et al. 2021 Figure 8 parameter set and equations 4.17-4.18
figure8_region.note: Compares against the source parameter grid and equation-derived rectangle/oblique boundary only; no source panel pixels, digitized curves, or calibration thresholds are published.
